generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that your local community could be better prepared for emergencies without costly federal programs? Many towns are successfully organizing neighborhood response teams with basic training and shared resources. It's a practical way to enhance security while maintaining our civil liberties. Why not ask your local officials about starting a program like this? #CommunityPreparedness #NationalSecurity
